_comment: The temporal spine of the Mended Mirror. Skin-agnostic data: the Scroll and the Astrolabe both read this. Years are integers, negative = BCE, positive = CE. 'to' = 2026 means living-to-present. certainty: attested | inferred | reconstructed | contested | deep (deep-time continuous, datable only as 'very old') | prophesied (future). Axis note for skins: the span runs ~-50000 to 2026, so the time axis MUST be non-linear (compress deep past, expand the last ~5000 years) or everything piles on the right edge.

highlights.name: The Axial Age
highlights.note: Within a few centuries: the Buddha, Mahavira, the Hebrew prophets, the Greek philosophers, Laozi & Confucius — a planetary simultaneity of awakening. The scroll should make this band glow.

aboriginal.note: The Dreaming — among the oldest continuous living cultures on Earth (~50,000+ yrs).

san.note: The |Xam/San — deep-time continuous; rock-art tens of millennia old.

pie.note: Proto-Indo-European homeland & dispersal; a linguistic reconstruction, not an attestation.

mesopotamian.note: Sumer → Babylon; last datable cuneiform (Uruk almanac) 79/80 CE.

egyptian.note: Dynastic; last hieroglyphs ~394 CE, Philae closed 537.

basque.note: Pre-Indo-European substrate; recoverable mostly through late folklore.

sami.note: Indigenous Fennoscandia; the deep date is inferred from Iron-Age archaeology (direct records only 17th–18th c.); living, with active revival.

canaanite.note: Ugarit/Levant; continued as Phoenician-Punic to the fall of Carthage (146 BCE).

hittite.note: Anatolian Bronze Age; ended at the Bronze Age collapse.

vedic.note: Rigvedic; continues as living Hindu tradition (Vedic→Hindu).

dravidian.note: Pre/para-Vedic South Indian substrate; living Tamil Shaivism & folk cults.

zoroastrian.note: Zoroaster's date debated (linguistic ~1200–1000 BCE vs traditional ~6th c. BCE); living among Parsis/Iranis.

abrahamic.note: Composite: Israelite Yahwism → Judaism / Christianity / Islam. Deserves its own splitting/deepening pass.

chinese.note: Shang → the I Ching/Laozi/Confucius axial flowering → living Taoism & folk religion.

mesoamerican.note: Composite: Olmec → Maya → Aztec; ended at the Conquest, with folk continuity.

finnish.note: Finnic pagan oral substrate; Christianized ~1200; compiled as the Kalevala in 1835.

andean.note: Chavín → Inca; ended at the Conquest, with Quechua/Aymara folk continuity.

tengrist.note: Steppe sky-cult; Tengri first attested ~4th c. BCE (Xiongnu) → Göktürk peak → living revival; substrate plausibly older.

arabian.note: Pre-Islamic Arabian; the Kaaba idols destroyed 630 CE with the rise of Islam.

korean.note: Foundation myth dates Dangun to 2333 BCE; muism/folk religion is living.

slavic.note: Rooted earlier; attested late; Christianization of Rus 988.

baltic.note: Conservative IE paganism; Lithuania was Europe's last pagan state (1387); revived as Romuva.

ainu.note: Jōmon-rooted; Ainu culture proper from ~13th c.; living, with revival.

tupi.note: Tupi-Guaraní; pre-contact, much recorded post-contact; some Guaraní communities continue.

pueblo.note: Ancestral Puebloan from Basketmaker II horticultural roots (maize ~1500 BCE→); Chaco/Mesa Verde peak ~1100; Hopi & Zuni continuous.

khoekhoe.note: Khoe pastoralists ~2000 yrs in southern Africa; the traditional religion was largely displaced by Christianity by ~1900, but the Nama survive with language, oral tradition & cultural revival.

gnostic.note: Gnostic/Hermetic/Manichaean; Manichaeism survived among the Uyghurs & in SE China into the 14th c.

taino.note: Greater Antilles Arawak; devastated after 1492; revival movements today.

polynesian.note: Proto-Polynesian pantheon crystallized in the Tonga–Samoa homeland (~1000–500 BCE, Lapita); East-Polynesian/Māori florescence ~1250–1500; living Māori tradition.

yoruba.note: Ife florescence; living, with vast diaspora (Santería, Candomblé).

dogon.note: Living; the Sirius/Nommo cosmology rests on Griaule's contested ethnography.

kongo.note: Kongo kingdom roots; living, with diaspora.

inuit.note: Thule culture ~1000 CE → Inuit (the figures are Thule-Inuit); rests on older Paleo-Eskimo (Pre-Dorset/Dorset) Arctic roots; living.

haudenosaunee.note: Confederacy founding contested: Haudenosaunee oral tradition (eclipse-dated) ~1142 vs mainstream archaeology ~1450; living.

navajo.note: Diné migration to the Southwest ~1400; living.

buddhist.note: From the Buddha — death-date contested (long chronology ~483 BCE vs short ~400 BCE); living across Asia & beyond.

bon.note: Archaic Tibetan substrate (undatable) systematized as Yungdrung Bön ~11th c. CE alongside Buddhism; living.

castaneda.note: The forgery — precisely datable to its publication run (1968–98).

judaism.note: YHWH, Torah, the covenant; the Oral Law (auto-dated; refine later)

mithraism.note: the tauroctony (bull-slaying); 7-grade cave initiation (auto-dated; refine later)

hermeticism.note: Hermes Trismegistus & the Corpus Hermeticum; 'as above, so below'; the nous-ascent (auto-dated; refine later)

isis-cult.note: Isis Myrionymos 'of ten-thousand names'; Serapis (auto-dated; refine later)

sol-invictus.note: the Unconquered Sun; Aurelian's 274 CE state cult; Dec-25 Dies Natalis (auto-dated; refine later)

manichaeism.note: Mani; radical Light/Darkness dualism — a universal world religion (auto-dated; refine later)

christianity.note: Christ, Trinity, the Cross & Resurrection (auto-dated; refine later)

islam.note: Allah, the Qur'an, the Prophet; Sunni/Shia/Sufi streams (auto-dated; refine later)

kabbalah.note: Ein Sof & the ten Sefirot; the Zohar (auto-dated; refine later)

bahai.note: Baháʼu'lláh; progressive revelation; unity of all religions (auto-dated; refine later)

druze.note: al-Hakim as divine manifestation; taqammus (reincarnation); closed initiation (auto-dated; refine later)

yazidism.note: Melek Taûs the Peacock Angel; the seven holy beings (auto-dated; refine later)

mandaeism.note: John the Baptist as great prophet; World of Light vs Darkness; masbuta baptism (auto-dated; refine later)

rastafari.note: Haile Selassie I as Jah; Babylon vs Zion; Ethiopianism; the ganja sacrament (auto-dated; refine later)

sikh.note: Ik Onkar — one formless creator; the Guru Granth Sahib as living Guru (auto-dated; refine later)

confucian.note: Confucius; Tian (Heaven); ren & li; sage & ancestor veneration (auto-dated; refine later)

taoism-religious.note: Zhang Daoling & the Celestial Masters; the Jade Emperor; talismanic liturgy; neidan alchemy (auto-dated; refine later)

chinese-folk.note: the Jade Emperor's bureaucratic pantheon; ancestor worship; temple cults (auto-dated; refine later)

santeria.note: the Orichas (Elegguá, Changó, Yemayá) under the Catholic saints; Ifá divination; the asiento (auto-dated; refine later)

vodou-haitian.note: the Lwa (Legba, Erzulie, Baron Samedi) in Rada & Petwo nanchon; the poto-mitan (auto-dated; refine later)

candomble.note: the Orixás in nação houses (Ketu/Jeje/Angola); axé; the terreiro (auto-dated; refine later)

alchemy.note: the Magnum Opus; the Philosopher's Stone; nigredo→albedo→rubedo (auto-dated; refine later)

rosicrucianism.note: Christian Rosenkreuz & the Fama Fraternitatis; the invisible college (auto-dated; refine later)

freemasonry.note: the Craft degrees; Hiram Abiff; the Royal Art as moral allegory (auto-dated; refine later)

golden-dawn.note: Mathers/Westcott/Woodman; the master-synthesis of Western ceremonial magic (auto-dated; refine later)

thelema.note: Aleister Crowley & the Book of the Law; 'Do what thou wilt'; True Will; the Aeon of Horus (auto-dated; refine later)

theosophy.note: H.P. Blavatsky & the Secret Doctrine; the Masters; root-races; akasha — ★ the root of the New Age (auto-dated; refine later)

spiritualism.note: the Fox sisters; mediumship; 'no death, only transition' — the 19th-c root of channeling (auto-dated; refine later)

satanism-laveyan.note: Anton LaVey & the Satanic Bible; self-as-one's-own-god; indulgence over abstinence (auto-dated; refine later)

wicca.note: Gerald Gardner & the Wiccan Rede; the Goddess & Horned God; the coven; the Wheel of the Year (auto-dated; refine later)

new-age.note: the coming Age of Aquarius; channeling, crystals, holism, self-as-divine (auto-dated; refine later)

new-thought.note: Quimby; 'thoughts create reality'; divine Mind; the root of the Law of Attraction (auto-dated; refine later)

scientology.note: L. Ron Hubbard; the thetan; the reactive mind; auditing toward 'Clear' (auto-dated; refine later)

ufo-religions.note: the Elohim cloned us (Raël); shed the vehicle to board the craft (Heaven's Gate); the Cosmic Masters (Aetheriu (auto-dated; refine later)

elamite.note: Inshushinak + the highland triad Napirisha/Kiririsha (auto-dated; refine later)

hurrian.note: Teshub vs Kumarbi succession-myth — the SOURCE of the Greek Kronos-Zeus pattern (auto-dated; refine later)

urartian.note: Haldi the war-god atop a lion (auto-dated; refine later)

nubian.note: Apedemak the lion-headed war-god (indigenous, vs imported Amun) (auto-dated; refine later)

punic.note: Tanit & Baal Hammon; the tophet rite (auto-dated; refine later)

berber.note: Gurzil the bull-god; Tanit/Ifri; the Siwa oracle of Ammon (auto-dated; refine later)

harappan.note: the 'Pashupati' proto-Shiva seal; terracotta Mother-Goddess; pipal & water cult (auto-dated; refine later)

minoan.note: the Snake-Goddess / Mountain-Mother; labrys & bull-leaping (auto-dated; refine later)

mycenaean.note: Potnia 'the Lady'; earliest attested Zeus/Poseidon (auto-dated; refine later)

scythian.note: Tabiti the fire/hearth goddess; Ares as a planted iron sword (auto-dated; refine later)

thracian.note: Zalmoxis the immortality-god; the Thracian Horseman (auto-dated; refine later)

eleusinian.note: Demeter & Persephone; the secret kykeon initiation (auto-dated; refine later)

orphism.note: Orpheus & dismembered Zagreus; the gold soul-tablets (auto-dated; refine later)

pythagorean.note: number as cosmos; metempsychosis; the akousmata brotherhood (auto-dated; refine later)

dionysian.note: ecstatic mania, maenads, the liknon (auto-dated; refine later)

cybele.note: the Great Mother & Attis; the Galli; the taurobolium blood-baptism (auto-dated; refine later)

neoplatonism.note: Plotinus' emanation from the One; theurgy (Iamblichus) (auto-dated; refine later)

stoicism.note: the Logos/pneuma pervading a providential cosmos; kata physin (auto-dated; refine later)

samaritanism.note: Mt Gerizim (not Jerusalem); the Samaritan Pentateuch (auto-dated; refine later)

yarsanism.note: Sultan Sahak; the Divine in seven avatars; the jam (auto-dated; refine later)

alevism.note: the cem ritual, semah dance; the Twelve Imams; no mosque (auto-dated; refine later)

nation-of-islam.note: W.D. Fard as God-in-person; Elijah Muhammad; Yakub myth; the Mother Plane (auto-dated; refine later)

kalash.note: Dezau the creator; Balumain — the LAST living Indo-Aryan pagan tradition (auto-dated; refine later)

sarnaism.note: the sacred grove (sarna sthal); village & ancestral spirits (auto-dated; refine later)

falun-gong.note: Li Hongzhi; the rotating falun; Zhen-Shan-Ren (truth-compassion-forbearance) (auto-dated; refine later)

tenrikyo.note: Nakayama Miki; Oyagami 'God the Parent'; the Joyous Life (auto-dated; refine later)

cheondoism.note: Choe Je-u; 'In-nae-cheon' — humanity IS Heaven (auto-dated; refine later)

rapanui.note: Makemake the creator; the Tangata Manu (Birdman) cult at Orongo; the moai (auto-dated; refine later)

caodai.note: the supreme Cao Đài via séance; the Divine Eye; saints Victor Hugo & Sun Yat-sen (auto-dated; refine later)

balinese-hindu.note: Acintya/Sang Hyang Widhi; Tri Hita Karana; offering-ritualism (auto-dated; refine later)

melanesian.note: mana — the impersonal sacred power (Codrington's source-concept); ancestral tindalo (auto-dated; refine later)

cargo-cult.note: John Frum; the Prince Philip Movement; Western goods as returning-ancestor cargo (auto-dated; refine later)

papuan.note: ancestral ghosts & the pig-exchange (Te/Moka); the Asmat bisj poles; the Marind Dema (auto-dated; refine later)

micronesian.note: Nan Madol's priest-kings & Isokelekel; Puntan & Fu'una the Chamorro sibling-creators (auto-dated; refine later)

anito.note: anito & diwata spirits; Bathala; the babaylan shaman-priestess (auto-dated; refine later)

evenki.note: Buga the cosmos-spirit; the three-world taiga — ★ the etymological HOME of the word 'shaman' (auto-dated; refine later)

yakut.note: Ürüng Aiyy Toyon the white-creator vs the abaasy; the white-vs-black shaman split (auto-dated; refine later)

chukchi.note: Raven (Kutkh) the trickster-creator; Amanita shamanism (auto-dated; refine later)

shona.note: Mwari/Musikavanhu at the Matonjeni oracle-caves; the mhondoro lion-spirits (auto-dated; refine later)

maasai.note: Enkai/Engai, the black-and-red sky-god of Ol Doinyo Lengai; cattle from God (auto-dated; refine later)

dinka-nuer.note: Nhialic / Kwoth the sky-creator; the ox-sacrifice & spear-master (auto-dated; refine later)

bambara.note: Maa Ngala the creator; the six initiation societies (Komo, Chiwara…) (auto-dated; refine later)

waaqeffanna.note: Waaqa the sky supreme-being; the Gadaa system; the Irreecha thanksgiving (auto-dated; refine later)

umbanda.note: Kardecist spiritism + Orixás + the Pretos Velhos, Caboclos & Exu spirit-lines (auto-dated; refine later)

quimbanda.note: Exu & Pomba Gira worked for direct results; the reinos of Exu (auto-dated; refine later)

palo.note: Nzambi + the nganga/prenda cauldron housing an nfumbi spirit; the mpungos (auto-dated; refine later)

espiritismo.note: Kardecan spiritism creolized; the mesa blanca; spirit guides; the 'cruzado' fusion with Santería (auto-dated; refine later)

jamaican-revival.note: Kongo ancestral possession (Kumina); the obeah-man's spirit-work; Revival Zion bands of angels (auto-dated; refine later)

hoodoo.note: mojo bags, goofer dust, crossroads work, High John the Conqueror; psalms as spells (auto-dated; refine later)

cherokee.note: Unetlanvhi the Great Spirit; the three-world cosmos; the Uktena horned serpent (auto-dated; refine later)

ojibwe.note: Gitche Manitou the Great Mystery; Nanabozho the trickster-transformer; the Midewiwin lodge (auto-dated; refine later)

muscogee.note: the sacred fire & the Green Corn (Busk) renewal; the Master of Breath; the Cahokia Birdman (auto-dated; refine later)

native-american-church.note: the peyote sacrament ('Mescalito'); the Half-Moon altar; the Peyote Road (auto-dated; refine later)

aztec.note: Huitzilopochtli demanding blood to forestall the Fifth Sun's collapse (auto-dated; refine later)

maya.note: Itzamna & the Popol Vuh Hero Twins; the Lords of Xibalba; K'inich Ajaw (auto-dated; refine later)

amazonian.note: Omama & the xapiri; the ayahuasca icaros & kené patterns; the Sun-Father's Yuruparí order (auto-dated; refine later)

hermetic-qabalah.note: the Tree of Life & 32 Paths as the occult skeleton of the West (auto-dated; refine later)

anthroposophy.note: Rudolf Steiner; spiritual science; the etheric Christ; Waldorf & biodynamics (auto-dated; refine later)

fourth-way.note: G.I. Gurdjieff; 'man is asleep'; self-remembering; the Enneagram; conscious labor (auto-dated; refine later)

chaos-magic.note: Carroll & Spare's sigils; 'nothing is true, everything is permitted'; belief as a tool (auto-dated; refine later)

satanic-temple.note: Baphomet-as-civil-liberties; the Seven Tenets; non-theistic activism (auto-dated; refine later)

theistic-satanism.note: worship of Satan as a real entity (vs LaVey's symbol) (auto-dated; refine later)

temple-of-set.note: Michael Aquino; Set as the principle of isolate intelligence (Xeper) (auto-dated; refine later)

luciferianism.note: Lucifer as light-bringer/liberator (not Satan); gnostic-adjacent self-divinization (auto-dated; refine later)

modern-druidry.note: Iolo Morganwg's bardic revival; the awen; the bard-ovate-druid path (auto-dated; refine later)

heathenry.note: Sveinbjörn Beinteinsson; the blót; the Nine Noble Virtues; the Æsir reborn (auto-dated; refine later)

goddess-movement.note: the Great Goddess reclaimed; thealogy; 'the Goddess is alive' (auto-dated; refine later)

channeling.note: Seth (Jane Roberts), Ramtha (JZ Knight), A Course in Miracles (Schucman); 'you create your own reality' (auto-dated; refine later)

neoshamanism.note: Michael Harner's 'core' shamanic journey to non-ordinary reality via the drum (auto-dated; refine later)

eckankar.note: Paul Twitchell; Soul Travel via the Light & Sound of God (ECK); the living Mahanta (auto-dated; refine later)

transcendental-meditation.note: Maharishi Mahesh Yogi; the mantra technique; the Maharishi Effect (auto-dated; refine later)

entheogenic-churches.note: the ayahuasca sacrament 'Daime' & the hymns; the UDV's hoasca; Gabonese iboga & the initiatory death-rebirth (auto-dated; refine later)

goetia.note: the 72 demons of the Lesser Key of Solomon; conjure-and-command magic (auto-dated; refine later)

deism.note: a Creator known by reason who does not intervene; the clockmaker God (auto-dated; refine later)

pantheism.note: God and Nature are identical (Deus sive Natura); the living Earth revered (Gaia) (auto-dated; refine later)

illyrian.note: Dei-pátrous / Redon; serpent-veneration → Albanian folklore (auto-dated; refine later)

iberian.note: the Lady-goddess (Dama de Elche); sphinx/underworld cult (auto-dated; refine later)

lusitanian.note: Endovelicus the oracular healer; Ataecina (auto-dated; refine later)

guanche.note: Achamán the sky-father; Guayota the volcano-demon of Teide (auto-dated; refine later)

epicureanism.note: gods in the metakosmia, indifferent; atomism; ataraxia (auto-dated; refine later)

black-hebrew-israelites.note: African Americans as the literal lost tribes of Israel (auto-dated; refine later)

ayyavazhi.note: Ayya Vaikundar; the Akilam scripture; anti-caste (auto-dated; refine later)

brahmoism.note: Ram Mohan Roy / Dayananda; formless monotheism; 'back to the Vedas' (auto-dated; refine later)

yiguandao.note: the Eternal Venerable Mother (Wusheng Laomu); five-teachings syncretism; spirit-writing (auto-dated; refine later)

fijian.note: Degei the great serpent-god; ancestral vū spirits (auto-dated; refine later)

hmong.note: the txiv neeb shaman; soul-calling (hu plig); three-world journeys (auto-dated; refine later)

buryat.note: the 99 tengri; Father-Heaven/Mother-Earth; the böö shamans of Olkhon (auto-dated; refine later)

nenets.note: Num the sky-god & Nga the death-god; Ya-Nebya 'Mother Earth'; the sacred sledge (auto-dated; refine later)

khanty-mansi.note: Numi-Torum the sky-father; the World-Surveyor-Man; the bear-feast (auto-dated; refine later)

kikuyu.note: Ngai/Mwene-Nyaga on Mt Kenya; the Gĩkũyũ & Mũmbi ancestral couple (auto-dated; refine later)

serer.note: Roog Sene the supreme immensity; the pangool ancestral intercessors (auto-dated; refine later)

chewa.note: Chiuta the rainbow sky-creator; the Nyau secret society & Gule Wamkulu masked dance (auto-dated; refine later)

baganda.note: Katonda the distant creator; the Balubaale pantheon (Mukasa, Kibuka); royal shrines (auto-dated; refine later)

luba-kuba.note: Shakapanga/Leza; Mbombo/Bumba who vomited the sun & moon into being (auto-dated; refine later)

tswana-sotho.note: Modimo the source-of-all via the badimo ancestors; rain-making (auto-dated; refine later)

ewe-ga.note: Ewe Mawu-Lisa & Afa divination; Ga Ataa-Naa Nyongmo & the Homowo festival (auto-dated; refine later)

abakua.note: all-male Cross-River Ékpè leopard society; the Sikán myth; the Ekue drum; the Íreme masquerade (auto-dated; refine later)

winti.note: Anana the creator + pantheons of winti spirits (Aisa, Papa Winti, the Kromanti) (auto-dated; refine later)

ghost-dance.note: Wovoka's circle-dance prophecy of the returning dead; the Ghost Shirt (auto-dated; refine later)

olmec.note: the were-jaguar / proto-Feathered-Serpent — the 'mother culture' the later gods descend from (auto-dated; refine later)

zapotec-mixtec.note: Cocijo the lightning-rain god; Dzahui; the codex lineage-cosmology (auto-dated; refine later)

muisca.note: Bochica the bearded culture-hero; the El Dorado gold-offering at Guatavita (auto-dated; refine later)

fuegian.note: Temáukel & the Hain initiation with its masked spirits; Watauinéwa — the southernmost human religion (auto-dated; refine later)

stregheria.note: Leland's Aradia; Diana, Lucifer & Aradia as witch-deities (auto-dated; refine later)

church-of-all-worlds.note: Heinlein-derived 'Thou art God/Goddess'; water-sharing; Gaia the living Earth (auto-dated; refine later)

subud.note: Muhammad Subuh (Bapak); the latihan kejiwaan — spontaneous surrender to the divine force (auto-dated; refine later)

urantia.note: the celestial-authored Urantia Book cosmology; the Thought Adjuster; an expanded Jesus (Michael) (auto-dated; refine later)

secular-humanism.note: human reason, ethics & dignity without the supernatural; Ethical Culture's 'deed before creed' (auto-dated; refine later)

shaiva.note: Shiva as supreme reality; lingam, Nataraja, the third eye (auto-dated; refine later)

vaishnava.note: Vishnu/Krishna; the avatara doctrine; bhakti (auto-dated; refine later)

shakta.note: Devi/Shakti supreme; Durga, Kali, the ten Mahavidyas (auto-dated; refine later)

lingayat.note: Basava; the ishtalinga; rejection of caste & rebirth (auto-dated; refine later)

andean-pre-inca.note: the Chavín Lanzón Staff-God; the Moche 'Decapitator' Ai-Apaec; the Tiwanaku Gateway-of-the-Sun (Viracocha prot (auto-dated; refine later)

unitarian-universalist.note: a creedless covenantal faith drawing from all traditions; the inherent worth of every person (auto-dated; refine later)

ascended-masters.note: Saint Germain & the Great White Brotherhood; the Violet Flame; decrees (auto-dated; refine later)

parody-religions.note: Eris/Discordianism, the Flying Spaghetti Monster, Jediism, the Church of the SubGenius's 'Slack', Kopimism, Du (auto-dated; refine later)

nat-burmese.note: the Thirty-Seven Nats (spirits of violent death); Mahagiri; nat-pwe possession (auto-dated; refine later)

phi-thai.note: the phi spirits & the spirit-house; Khmer neak ta territorial guardians; the baci soul-calling (auto-dated; refine later)

swedenborgian.note: Emanuel Swedenborg; the doctrine of correspondences; heaven & hell as inner states (auto-dated; refine later)

nation-of-islam-esoteric.note: Moorish Science (Noble Drew Ali); the Five-Percent Nation's Supreme Mathematics (auto-dated; refine later)

modern-hindu-nrm.note: TM, Brahma Kumaris, Self-Realization Fellowship, Ananda Marga, Osho, Sahaja Yoga, ISKCON (auto-dated; refine later)

buddhist-vehicles.note: the arahant / the bodhisattva / the tantric deity-yoga (auto-dated; refine later)

transhumanist-religion.note: Fyodorov's Cosmist 'Common Task' (resurrect all the dead); Terasem (mindfiles); the Turing Church; Way of the  (auto-dated; refine later)

order-nine-angles.note: 'Anton Long' (David Myatt); the sinister Seven-Fold Way (auto-dated; refine later)

california-tribes.note: Hutash the Earth-Mother & the Rainbow Bridge; the 'antap astronomer-priesthood; Sky-Coyote (auto-dated; refine later)

harranian.note: seven planetary temple-spirits; Hermes as prophet — last living pagan astral cult (auto-dated; refine later)

mongol-folk.note: Qormusta Tengri, chief of the 99 tngri; ovoo cairn-offerings (auto-dated; refine later)

orisha-trinidad.note: the Orishas (Shango central) feasted with saints; the 'mourning' rite, bell & chalk veves (auto-dated; refine later)

alawite.note: the Ali-Muhammad-Salman trinity; metempsychosis; secret rites (auto-dated; refine later)

divination-systems.note: the zodiac as fate-map; the 78 Tarot keys; Pythagorean sacred number (auto-dated; refine later)

christ.note: The historical Jesus ~4 BCE–30 CE; the risen Christ as worshipped develops after.

castaneda-tonal-nagual.note: The fabricated shard, datable to publication.

ein-sof.note: The Kabbalistic Ein Sof crystallizes ~12th–13th c. (Sefer ha-Zohar).

saoshyant.note: The Zoroastrian end-time savior — a future, not a past; lives to the RIGHT of now.

frashokereti.note: The final renovation of the world — eschatological future.

tupi-yvymarane.note: The Land-Without-Evil — a paradise still sought; a future on the scroll.

indra|perun.note: Divergence: both inherit the PIE storm-god *Perkʷūnos.

baal|yahweh.note: Israelite adoption of Canaanite storm/Chaoskampf imagery (Iron Age).

demeter|isis.note: Hellenistic syncretism of the two great mother-goddesses.

christ|osiris.note: The dying-rising parallel — real but Frazer over-read it; held at arm's length, not asserted.

sami-horagalles|thor.note: Norse loan laid over the indigenous thunder-god during the Viking age.

tupi-tupa|yahweh.note: Jesuit elevation of Tupã to 'God' in the reductions.

hawaiian-kane|tane.note: Divergence: Hawaiian Kāne and Māori Tāne split as Polynesians settled the far islands.

tonal-nagual|yin-yang.note: Horden’s The Toltec I Ching (2009) — a documented modern synthesis.

castaneda-tonal-nagual|tonal-nagual.note: The forgery published — its seam points home to the real line it imitated.
